# @verevoir/media

> Display concern for assets. Deterministic imgproxy URL builder, AssetSource abstraction, image/video block definitions, React components. Depends on `@verevoir/schema`.

## Install

```bash
npm install @verevoir/media
```

Peer dependencies: `react`, `react-dom`.

## URL Building

### buildImageUrl(asset, resize, config)

Generates a deterministic imgproxy URL for an asset.

```typescript
import { buildImageUrl, buildSrcSet } from '@verevoir/media';

const url = buildImageUrl(asset, { width: 800, height: 600 }, imgproxyConfig);
const srcSet = buildSrcSet(asset, 800, 600, imgproxyConfig); // 1x and 2x
```

### ImgproxyConfig

```typescript
interface ImgproxyConfig {
  baseUrl: string; // e.g. 'https://imgproxy.example.com'
  sourceBaseUrl: string; // e.g. 'https://storage.googleapis.com/my-bucket'
}
```

## AssetSource

Bridges AssetManager to display components via structural typing (no import from @verevoir/assets).

```typescript
import { createAssetSource } from '@verevoir/media';

const assetSource = createAssetSource({
  manager: assetManager, // any object with get/list/upload/updateMetadata
  blobUrl: (id) => `https://cdn.example.com/assets/${id}`,
});
```

## Block Definitions

Pre-defined blocks for image and video content:

```typescript
import { imageBlock, videoBlock } from '@verevoir/media';

// imageBlock fields: asset (reference), alt, caption
// videoBlock fields: asset (reference), caption
```

## React Components & Providers

### AssetSourceProvider

```tsx
import { AssetSourceProvider } from '@verevoir/media';

<AssetSourceProvider source={assetSource}>
  <App />
</AssetSourceProvider>
```

### ImgproxyConfigProvider

```tsx
import { ImgproxyConfigProvider } from '@verevoir/media';

<ImgproxyConfigProvider config={{ baseUrl: '...', sourceBaseUrl: '...' }}>
  <App />
</ImgproxyConfigProvider>
```

### ImageField

Asset picker with preview. For use in block editors.

```tsx
import { ImageField } from '@verevoir/media';

<ImageField value={assetId} onChange={setAssetId} />
```

### HotspotOverlay

Click-to-set focal point overlay for images.

```tsx
import { HotspotOverlay } from '@verevoir/media';

<HotspotOverlay hotspot={hotspot} onChange={setHotspot} src={imageUrl} />
```

### imageProps(asset, width, height, config)

Render helper that returns `{ src, srcSet, alt, width, height }` for an `<img>` tag.

```typescript
import { imageProps } from '@verevoir/media';

const props = imageProps(asset, 800, 600, config);
// <img {...props} />
```

## Types

```typescript
interface AssetInfo { id: string; contentType: string; filename: string; width: number | null; height: number | null; hotspot: Hotspot | null; alt: string | null; }
interface Hotspot { x: number; y: number; } // 0-1 range, focal point
interface ResizeOptions { width?: number; height?: number; }
```
